title: Successful user login with valid credentials
description: Verify that a user can log in successfully using a valid username and password, and receives a valid JWT token and correct user details.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with valid username and password
Verify response status code is 200 OK
Verify response contains a valid JWT token
Verify response contains correct user details including id, username, email, fullName, and role

title: Login failure with invalid username
description: Verify that login fails with HTTP 401 Unauthorized when a non-existent username is used.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with invalid username and any password
Verify response status code is 401 Unauthorized
Verify response message indicates invalid username or password

title: Login failure with invalid password
description: Verify that login fails with HTTP 401 Unauthorized when the password is incorrect for an existing username.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with valid username and incorrect password
Verify response status code is 401 Unauthorized
Verify response message indicates invalid username or password

title: Login failure with deactivated user account
description: Verify that login fails with HTTP 403 Forbidden when the user account is deactivated.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with credentials of a deactivated user account
Verify response status code is 403 Forbidden
Verify response message indicates the account is deactivated

title: Successful new user registration with valid details
description: Verify that a new user is registered successfully using valid username, email, password, full name, phone number, and role.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/register with unique username, unique email, valid password, full name, phone number, and role
Verify response status code is 201 Created
Verify response contains message confirming successful user registration

title: Registration failure when username already exists
description: Verify that registration fails with HTTP 400 Bad Request if the username is already taken.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/register with a username that already exists and a unique email
Verify response status code is 400 Bad Request
Verify response message indicates that username already exists

title: Registration failure when email already exists
description: Verify that registration fails with HTTP 400 Bad Request if the email is already taken.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/register with a unique username and an email that is already registered
Verify response status code is 400 Bad Request
Verify response message indicates that email already exists

title: Fetch current authenticated user details with valid token
description: Verify that fetching /api/auth/me returns user details correctly when a valid JWT token is provided in the Authorization header.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/auth/me with a valid JWT token in Authorization header
Verify response status code is 200 OK
Verify response includes correct user details: id, username, email, fullName, and role

title: Fetch current user fails with missing token
description: Verify that fetching /api/auth/me returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized if no JWT token is provided.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/auth/me without Authorization header
Verify response status code is 401 Unauthorized
Verify response message indicates unauthorized access

title: Fetch current user fails with invalid or expired token
description: Verify that fetching /api/auth/me returns HTTP 401 Unauthorized when an invalid or expired JWT token is provided.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/auth/me with an invalid or expired JWT token in Authorization header
Verify response status code is 401 Unauthorized
Verify response message indicates unauthorized access

title: API health test endpoint returns success message
description: Verify that the /api/auth/test endpoint is reachable and returns a success message confirming the service availability.

steps.description: Send GET request to /api/auth/test
Verify response status code is 200 OK
Verify response message confirms API is reachable and operational

title: Registration failure with missing required fields
description: Verify that registration fails with HTTP 400 Bad Request if required fields such as username, email, password, fullName or role are missing from the request.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/register with one or more required fields missing
Verify response status code is 400 Bad Request
Verify response message indicates validation error for missing fields

title: Login failure with empty username and/or password
description: Verify that login fails with HTTP 401 Unauthorized when username or password fields are empty in the login request.

steps.description: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with empty username and/or password fields
Verify response status code is 401 Unauthorized
Verify response message indicates invalid username or password
